name: Inventory Lens
description: Public Roblox inventory analyzer for exact copies, collector context, and local collection graphics.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https://rbxcdn.com https://*.rbxcdn.com; connect-src https://users.roblox.com https://catalog.roblox.com https://inventory.roblox.com https://thumbnails.roblox.com https://roblox.fandom.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
